error_reason: column name mismatch and positional data mismatch
gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.molecule_id) FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN bond AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id WHERE T1.element <> 's' AND T2.bond_type <> '='
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id)
FROM molecule m
WHERE m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT a.molecule_id
    FROM atom a
    WHERE a.element = 's'
)
AND m.molecule_id NOT IN (
    SELECT b.molecule_id
    FROM bond b
    WHERE b.bond_type = '='
);
